“兄弟别这样子说，被酒色掏空了身体？
那就来钓鱼吧，晒太阳是很好的补肾方法！跋山涉水又能煅炼身体，在水边盯着浮膘，放空自己啥也不想，又能缓解自身的压力，远离暄嚣，呼吸点新鲜空气，对心肺也都有好处！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fbab322377e332a4165ca9079b0563ac","author":"贫道渔洋","author_id":"","book_id":"7545652787527289880","book_name":"钓鱼发家：从打劫土狗开始","book_short_name":"灵犬钓鱼发家","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8c088","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7545882392787943960","read_count":"65510","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"617341"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"227","tags":"都市种田,都市,多女主,钓鱼,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6a17f4b6e42cf0383882eb39c5626dff~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311756&x-signature=Lml3b5ycU7ILISFO5pVboZtO%2B2U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108432043469","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"195"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322051555FF50561D609701521054"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":35513,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":71165,"
